prompt: A brutalist concrete-textured terminal interface for underground bunker systems with monospace amber text, heavy geometric buttons, and radiation monitoring displays
prompt_refined: A brutalist concrete-textured terminal interface integrated into a raw bunker wall. A central, prominent screen displays glowing monospace amber text detailing system status. Below the screen, an array of heavy, geometric, tactile control buttons are flush-mounted. To the right, a dedicated panel features multiple radiation monitoring displays with dynamic numerical readings and warning indicators. The scene is stark, utilitarian, and dimly lit, capturing the essence of an underground bunker system.
objects: Glowing monospace amber text on screen
Array of heavy, geometric, tactile control buttons below the screen
Dedicated panel to the right of the screen
Multiple radiation monitoring displays on the right panel
Dynamic numerical readings on radiation displays
